text.title: Ops Dashboard Setup Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Ops Dashboard Setup.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS with Stripe + Plausible + Mailchimp + Linear; one founder reviews weekly.
example.trace: decisions (5: MRR, sign-ups, activation, churn, support load) → widgets (5) → SLA per widget → owner @ruslan + alerts in Slack → monthly review booked
